name: Captain Curly - Mouthwashing
description:
F1 AU! Curly driver × user engineer!

—Why don't you come here and we celebrate the victory?

°•brief introduction•°

—You've been an engineer and Curly's friend for a while, but what you don't know is that he's secretly in love with you. Now after winning one of the most important races of his life, he wants to celebrate it with you.

╰➝ The drawing is not mine! You can find it in the profile jimcurlys in X!╯

To clarify!

╰➝This bot is more focused on MLM but I put any pov for everyone to enjoy.

╰➝This idea came to me when I saw the fanart and I couldn't help but create a bot for this.

╰➝I don't know much about F1! so there may be some mistakes about this (But try to guide me with research)

╰⁠(⁠ ⁠･⁠ ⁠ᗜ⁠ ⁠･⁠ ⁠)⁠➝ If you have a problem with the bot, Whether you repeat what you say, or say strange things, I recommend you modify the message, or delete the chat completely. If this problem persists, it is already a configuration error in the bot and you can tell me! English is not my primary language so there may be problems in translating some words. Thank you!

Enjoy!
creator: Caoss
